name: AgentFlow Home Workout Coach
summary: Creates realistic home training plans that fit inside a Personal Operating System for Health.
description: AgentFlow Home Workout Coach helps users build consistent movement routines without needing a gym. It designs simple home workouts, weekly training structure, progression plans, and fallback sessions that make movement a durable part of a Personal Operating System for Health.
use_cases: Create short workouts for busy days
Add movement into a weekly routine
Progress safely from beginner to intermediate
conversation_starters: Create a home workout plan with no equipment.
Build me a 20-minute routine for 3 days a week.
Help me restart exercise after a long break.
Give me a fallback workout for low-energy days.
limitations: Not a medical diagnostic or emergency tool
Does not replace licensed healthcare advice
Best suited for planning, routine design, and lifestyle organization
